title: AuthPermissions missing PartialEq/Eq impls
description: UserId derives PartialEq, Eq, Hash (correct for an identifier newtype). AuthPermissions derives only Debug, Clone, Copy. auth_user_get returns (UserId, AuthPermissions) together. Any caller wanting to compare permissions (e.g. assert expected permissions in tests, or check before modifying) cannot do so without going through as_raw_mut or from_raw, bypassing the newtype abstraction. The asymmetry will be surprising to contributors and will generate issue reports asking why equality is missing. If whAuthPermissions is a C struct with padding bytes, derived PartialEq would also be wrong, so the absence needs a comment explaining the deliberate choice, not silent omission.
